columns.name: EffectiveAt
columns.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of the event

columns.name: ActorType
columns.description: The actor who performed the audit logged action

columns.name: ActorApiKey
columns.description: The API Key used to perform the audit logged action

columns.name: ActorSession
columns.description: The session in which the audit logged action was performed

columns.name: Project
columns.description: The project that the action was scoped to

columns.name: EventDetails
columns.description: Details of the audit log event

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: The friendly name of the connector instance that collected this log
